project_name: MailTrack Pro - Email Tracking Extension & Dashboard

theme_and_archetype.description: Authoritative, clear, and highly functional. Emphasizes productivity and precision with stark contrast and clean lines. Breaks the generic SaaS mold with strong typography and minimal visual noise.

fonts.install_command: Use Google Fonts or Fontsource for IBM Plex Sans. Include Cabinet Grotesk via CDN or local assets.

rules.no_gradients: Do not use full-screen gradients or purple-blue combinations. Stick to solid, high-contrast flat colors.
rules.hover_states: Interactive elements must clearly shift in contrast. Buttons invert or shift background brightness.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy for Web, Space Efficiency for Extension

extension_popup.rule: Avoid automatic popups. Ensure high contrast and hide extra options behind expandable UI.

surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black transition-all

tables.headers: border-b border-slate-200 pb-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-500

interactions.hover: Subtle transform (-translate-y-0.5) on bento dashboard cards. High contrast background shifts on buttons.
interactions.motion: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling on the marketing page. Use Framer Motion for staggered list entrances in the dashboard.
interactions.accessibility: Ensure all interactive elements have focus states. Provide `aria-label` for icons (like the green ticks). Support `prefers-reduced-motion`.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2. Keep icons sharp and legible. Use Phosphor Icons if duotone is needed.

hero_image.usage: Marketing page hero section, half-width or bento grid highlight.

abstract_background.alt: Minimalistic abstract design featuring white geometric lines
abstract_background.usage: Subtle background texture for the marketing page or login screen (use with low opacity overlay).

feature_image.usage: Marketing page feature block to illustrate clean, distraction-free productivity.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-button"`, `data-testid="tracking-tick-status"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the Landing Page using custom HTML/Tailwind with asymmetrical Tetris grids and overlapping elements.
Build the Web Dashboard using Shadcn UI components, customizing them to be flat, with 1px crisp borders, removing excessive border-radius.
Build the Chrome Extension Popup UI as a strictly constrained (max 360px wide) interface with high density but clear hierarchy.
Implement the email track status with distinct UI states: Default/Sent (Grey Tick), Opened (Green Tick).
Use the exact color codes provided for the success tick (#10B981) to ensure brand consistency.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter or Roboto. Follow the provided typography scales strictly.
